description: LOTTE ON is a Korean e-commerce marketplace operated by Lotte Shopping. Its seller platform includes onboarding, seller-office tools, and APIs for managing products, orders, shipping, returns, customer service, settlement, and logistics.
summary: lotteon.com exposes one documented seller-focused HTTP OpenAPI at `https://openapi.lotteon.com`, authenticated with a seller-issued bearer API key tied to registered source IPs; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found on the domain.
